name: Continuity Sync
description: Keeps playback position saving working when the built-in continuity breaks. Saves every 10s and on pause/end using a wall-clock estimate instead of video.duration (which goes NaN after HLS stream switches). Restores position correctly when switching provider, server, dub/sub, or after a 403 network error forces you back to a working server.
author: Jbcbro
